mapper.sql: id, user_id, plan, amount, duration_days, expire_time, status, created_time, updated_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recharge_record (user_id, plan, amount, duration_days, expire_time, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{plan}, #{amount}, #{durationDays}, #{expireTime}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM recharge_record WHERE user_id = #{userId}
